commands.cmd: pnpm exec prettier --check <expanded T019 allowed source, tests, and docs>
commands.summary: All scoped files use Prettier style.

commands.cmd: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-grocery-cooking.test.ts tests/unit/cooking.test.ts

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Retained obsolete-manual rows preserve user values and override flags while clearing sourceRecipeIds, generated numeric values, uncertainty, formula inputs, and provenance; rendering suppresses obsolete contributions. Intake keys persist synchronously before dispatch, survive concurrent and unknown-outcome retries, rotate only after matching confirmed success, and resist late-response rotation. Multi-recipe and edge regressions pass without protected-boundary changes.
deviations: Used a lazy stable React state initializer for the synchronous operation tracker after the refs lint rule rejected render-time ref initialization.
Expanded the placeholder Prettier command to all T019 allowed paths.
remaining_blockers: Production build, rendered workflow, and accessibility evidence remain unverified while shared .next is owned by an active development process.
